title: audit-handoff output data
description:
A DRAFT ``InterviewSpec`` projected from durable audit records.

Derivable fields are filled and DISCLOSED; non-derivable fields are named in
``placeholders`` (never guessed). ``summary_artifact_candidates`` and
``entry_point_candidates`` are DETECTED-AND-DISCLOSED — the caller confirms
which (if any) is right. The whole result is a deterministic function of the
records + the source bytes (no timestamps, sorted candidate lists).

goal.description: The audit-open goal utterance, verbatim — null when the audit-open seat recorded none (then `goal` is also in `placeholders`).
goal.title: Goal

entry_point.description: A register_run entry_point block ({kind, run_name}) iff EXACTLY one @register_run function was found in the source. Null when zero or >1 were found (ambiguous → a placeholder; candidates listed in entry_point_candidates).
entry_point.title: Entry Point

entry_point_candidates.description: Every @register_run function name found in the source, sorted.
entry_point_candidates.title: Entry Point Candidates

audited_source.description: The draft audited_source block: {source, audit_id, template} plus the recorded config roots (input_roots / source_roots / output_roots / attention_order). Always derivable from the verb inputs + the config seat.
audited_source.title: Audited Source

task_axes.description: The audit-open task-axis utterances, verbatim — the human's names for what varies across tasks. GUIDANCE for the caller's task_generator (which is always a placeholder — axis names are not a materializer).
task_axes.title: Task Axes

summary_artifact_candidates.description: Result-relative paths the source WRITES under $HPC_RESULT_DIR, detected by the AST scan (sorted, deduped). Detected-and-disclosed — the caller confirms which is the citable summary artifact; the verb never picks.
summary_artifact_candidates.title: Summary Artifact Candidates

unverifiable_result_writes.description: Computed $HPC_RESULT_DIR path expressions the scanner could not reduce to a literal (an f-string with a computed tail, a non-literal join arg) — the honest gap, disclosed rather than silently dropped.
unverifiable_result_writes.title: Unverifiable Result Writes

placeholders.description: Fields the caller MUST fill before the interview — never guessed. Always includes task_generator + task_count + produced_by; includes goal when no goal was recorded, and entry_point when zero or >1 @register_run functions were found.
placeholders.title: Placeholders

disclosures.description: Honest notes about what was and was not derivable (e.g. multiple summary_artifact candidates, no goal recorded at audit open, an ambiguous entry point). Advisory; never blocks.
disclosures.title: Disclosures

HandoffPlaceholder.description: One field the caller MUST fill — the projection refuses to guess it.

field.description: The InterviewSpec field the caller must supply.
field.title: Field

reason.description: Why it is not derivable from the durable records (never guessed).
reason.title: Reason

HandoffPlaceholder.title: audit-handoff placeholder
